info.title: Consolidation Service
info.description: Multi-entity financial consolidation with intercompany eliminations.

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

ConsolidatedTbRow.description: A single row in the consolidated trial balance (pre-cache).

EntityHashEntry.description: Tracks the close_hash used for each entity so we can verify determinism.

IntercompanyMatch.description: A matched intercompany balance pair across two entities.

match_amount_minor.description: Amount matched (minor units) — the minimum of both sides.

PaginatedResponse_CoaMapping.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.
